== EntitySerializerRegistration.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using Cvoya.Graph.Model;
using Cvoya.Graph.Model.Serialization;

internal static class EntitySerializerRegistration
{
    [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    public static void Initialize()
    {
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register<TestNamespace.Person>(new TestNamespace.Generated.PersonSerializer());
    }
}

== TestNamespace_PersonSerializer.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph.Model;
using Cvoya.Graph.Model.Serialization;

namespace TestNamespace.Generated;

internal sealed class PersonSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(TestNamespace.Person);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        // Extracting init-only property 'Id'
        string idValue;
        // Look for property 'Id' in both simple and complex properties
        var idPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idSimpleProp) ? idSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idComplexProp) ? idComplexProp : null;
        if (idPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (idPropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                idValue = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                idValue = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            idValue = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");
        }

        var result = new TestNamespace.Person(
        )
        {
            Id = idValue
        };

        // Set remaining properties with setters
        // Look for property 'FirstName' in both simple and complex properties
        var firstnamePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("FirstName", out var firstnameSimpleProp) ? firstnameSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("FirstName", out var firstnameComplexProp) ? firstnameComplexProp : null;
        if (firstnamePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (firstnamePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.FirstName = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.FirstName = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.FirstName = string.Empty;
        }
        // Look for property 'LastName' in both simple and complex properties
        var lastnamePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("LastName", out var lastnameSimpleProp) ? lastnameSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("LastName", out var lastnameComplexProp) ? lastnameComplexProp : null;
        if (lastnamePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (lastnamePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.LastName = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.LastName = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.LastName = string.Empty;
        }
        // Look for property 'Age' in both simple and complex properties
        var agePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Age", out var ageSimpleProp) ? ageSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Age", out var ageComplexProp) ? ageComplexProp : null;
        if (agePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (agePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Age = (int)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Age = 0;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Age = 0;
        }
        // Look for property 'Labels' in both simple and complex properties
        var labelsPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Labels", out var labelsSimpleProp) ? labelsSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Labels", out var labelsComplexProp) ? labelsComplexProp : null;
        if (labelsPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract collection value
            if (labelsPropRep.Value is SimpleCollection simpleCollection)
            {
                var collection = new List<string>();
                foreach (var simpleValue in simpleCollection.Values)
                {
                    if (simpleValue.Object != null)
                    {
                        collection.Add((string)simpleValue.Object);
                    }
                }
                result.Labels = collection;
            }
            else
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Required collection property 'Labels' is missing or null");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Labels = new System.Collections.Generic.List<string>();
        }
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (TestNamespace.Person)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: FirstName
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("FirstName")!;
            var value = entity.FirstName;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "FirstName",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["FirstName"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: LastName
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("LastName")!;
            var value = entity.LastName;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "LastName",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["LastName"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Age
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("Age")!;
            var value = entity.Age;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                Object: value!,
                Type: typeof(int)
            );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Age",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Age"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Model.Node).GetProperty("Id")!;
            var value = entity.Id;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Id",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Id"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Labels
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Model.Node).GetProperty("Labels")!;
            var value = entity.Labels;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                var values = new List<SimpleValue>();
                foreach (var item in value)
                {
                    values.Add(new SimpleValue(
                        Object: item!,
                        Type: typeof(string)
                    ));
                }
                serializedValue = new SimpleCollection(
                    Values: values,
                    ElementType: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Labels",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Labels"] = propertyRep;
        }

        var actualLabels = entity.Labels?.ToList() ?? new List<string>();
        var primaryLabel = actualLabels.Count > 0 ? actualLabels[0] : "Person";
        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(TestNamespace.Person),
            Label: primaryLabel,
            ActualLabels: actualLabels,
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    private static readonly HashSet<Type> _currentlyProcessing = new();
    private static readonly Dictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for Person.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return PersonSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for Person.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(TestNamespace.Person);

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (_currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.Person),
                Label: "Person",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        _currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Labels
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("Labels")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Model.INode).GetProperty("Labels")!;
            simpleProperties["Labels"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Neo4jPropertyName: "Labels",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.SimpleCollection,
                ElementType: typeof(string),
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("Id")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Model.IEntity).GetProperty("Id")!;
            simpleProperties["Id"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Neo4jPropertyName: "Id",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: FirstName
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("FirstName")!;
            simpleProperties["FirstName"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Neo4jPropertyName: "FirstName",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: LastName
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("LastName")!;
            simpleProperties["LastName"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Neo4jPropertyName: "LastName",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Age
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Person).GetProperty("Age")!;
            simpleProperties["Age"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Neo4jPropertyName: "Age",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.Person),
                Label: "Person",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            _schemaCache[typeKey] = schema;
            return schema;
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            _currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}
